name: Italian Scalloped Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 4 medium Potatoes, about 1-1/4 lbs (4 cups, very thinly sliced)
1 can Cream of Mushroom Soup (10-3/4 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a greased 1-1/2-quart casserole dish, arrange half the potatoes and half the onion.
2. Sprinkle with half the mozzarella cheese and half the Parmesan cheese.
3. Repeat layers of potatoes, onion, mozzarella, and Parmesan.
4. Heat oven to 400 degrees F.
5. In a small bowl, combine soup, milk, Italian seasoning, and garlic powder.
6. Spoon the mixture over the potato mixture in the casserole dish.
7. Cover; bake for one hour.
8. Uncover; bake for an additional 10 minutes or until potatoes are tender.
9. Serve. Makes 6 servings.
